input.summary: Create a single workflow named 'full execution test' with a Manual Trigger connected to a Set node.
assumptions: The Set node does not need any specific fields configured — it will be left as a passthrough unless the user specifies otherwise.

item.name: full execution test
item.purpose: A simple workflow triggered manually that passes data through a Set node. Useful for testing that the n8n instance can execute workflows end-to-end without errors.

item.title: Verify 'full execution test' workflow runs successfully
item.instructions: Use verify-built-workflow with the work item ID from wf-1. Confirm the workflow runs without errors and the Manual Trigger output flows through the Set node producing at least one item.
